message.content:
Thoroughly explore the project at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system to identify:

1. ALL directories and key files - create a complete directory tree
2. Dead/unused code files (storybook, old references, etc.)
3. Inconsistencies between documentation and actual code
4. Files that seem abandoned or partially implemented
5. Package.json dependencies - identify any mismatches or unused deps
6. Any TODO/FIXME/HACK comments in the codebase

Focus on finding "garbage" and incongruent code. List everything in detail.

Do NOT make any changes - this is research only.
